narrative:
Juan José Cáceres is a Right-Back for Paraguay, boasting an overall rating of 7.32/10. This places him among the top 2% of right-backs competing in this tournament. His rating range of 6.96–7.67 reflects a solid match sample size.

Cáceres demonstrates strong defensive capabilities, with 4.51 tackles per 90 min and 5.33 clearances per 90 min at this World Cup. However, his attacking output is minimal, evidenced by 0.012 expected goals and 0.004 expected assists per 90 min. He registers only 0.41 shots per 90 min, highlighting a more conservative role.

Having played 439 minutes, Cáceres primarily provides defensive stability for Paraguay. While 77% of his overall rating comes from club form, his World Cup expected assists are significantly lower than his club average of 0.243. Scouts should watch for any increase in his offensive contributions in remaining matches, alongside his consistent defensive work.
